channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Daily Horoscope Guidance for April 3, 2026
item.description: Sally Brompton’s horoscope for April 3, 2026, provides daily astrological guidance for all zodiac signs, highlighting opportunities and cautions in different areas of life. For those celebrating a bir...

item.title: India-Bangladesh Discuss Strengthening Defence Cooperation and Regional Security
item.description: In New Delhi, Bangladesh High Commissioner to India, Riaz Hamidullah, met the Chief of Army Staff of India, General Upendra Dwivedi, to discuss enhancing defence ties between the two nations. The meet...

item.title: Nyeri Governor Kahiga Stands by President Ruto Over Ongoing Development
item.description: Nyeri Governor Mutahi Kahiga has publicly defended his decision to support President William Ruto, emphasising that his backing is based on the government's performance in delivering development proje...

item.title: Blake Lively to proceed with lawsuit over contract and retaliation claims against Justin Baldoni
item.description: Blake Lively has announced that she will continue her legal case against director and co-star Justin Baldoni, despite a judge dismissing most of her initial claims, including sexual harassment, defama...

item.title: Celebrating Xhosa Coming-of-Age: The Role of Mothers in Mgidi
item.description: Mzansi Magic’s new reality series, 'Mgidi Moms', takes viewers into the heart of Xhosa culture, exploring the journey of boys transitioning into manhood through ulwaluko, a traditional initiation rite...

item.title: 'Drag Race Philippines' Season 4 Contestant Misua Dies at Age Unknown
item.description: Filipino audiences are mourning the loss of Misua, a contestant from Season 4 of 'Drag Race Philippines'. The news, reported by ABS-CBN, marks a sad moment in the local entertainment industry, as Misu...

item.title: Edmonton Oilers secure 3-1 victory over Chicago, ending Blackhawks' playoff hopes
item.description: The Edmonton Oilers extended their strong form with a 3-1 victory over the Chicago Blackhawks, marking their fifth consecutive win of the season. Matthew Savoie scored the decisive goal, while Adam He...

item.title: Star Cinema Family Films to Watch This Holy Week Highlighting Love, Forgiveness, and Hope
item.description: This Holy Week, Star Cinema presents a selection of family-oriented films that emphasize themes of love, forgiveness, and hope. The featured movies provide meaningful stories suitable for viewers of a...

item.title: Kelley Day Opens Up About Her Growth and Skills After Leaving GirlTrends
item.description: Kelley Day, formerly a member of the popular dance group GirlTrends, recently shared insights about her life and career after leaving the show. She expressed that she has improved significantly in dan...

item.title: Rand Easter Show Provides Families a Moment of Fun Amid Economic Struggles
item.description: Despite ongoing economic pressure and rising petrol prices, many South Africans are finding ways to enjoy themselves this Easter weekend. The Rand Easter Show, held at the Johannesburg Expo Centre in ...

item.title: List of Nominees for the 2026 Crunchyroll Anime Awards Announced
item.description: ABS-CBN News reports that the nominees for the 2026 Crunchyroll Anime Awards have been officially revealed. The annual awards celebrate outstanding achievements in the anime industry, recognizing the ...

item.title: Liverpool and Ibrahima Konate in contract talks amid potential Real Madrid interest
item.description: Liverpool's contract negotiations with center-back Ibrahima Konate have hit a snag over salary expectations, with the French defender reportedly seeking a significant pay increase to match his importa...

item.title: Five killed in Karachi amid heavy rain and power outages
item.description: Karachi experienced intense rainfall on Thursday, resulting in widespread urban flooding, power outages, and multiple fatalities. The heaviest rainfall was recorded in Nazimabad at 69.6mm, while other...

item.title: Mpumalanga PPE contracts declared unlawful, owners instructed to return profits
item.description: Two personal protective equipment (PPE) contracts awarded in Mpumalanga during the Covid-19 pandemic, valued at over R14 million, have been ruled unlawful and set aside by the Special Tribunal. The co...

item.title: Alberta proposes measures to restrict access to sexually explicit materials for children in public libraries
item.description: The Alberta government has introduced legislation aimed at preventing children and young teens from accessing sexually explicit material in public libraries. Municipal Affairs Minister Dan Williams cl...

item.title: Reflecting on Suffering and Faith Amid Global Conflict
item.description: This article reflects on the profound meaning of Holy Week, particularly Good Friday, in the context of global conflicts. It draws attention to the suffering of Christians in Iran and Iraq, regions ce...

item.title: CBN inaugurates committee to coordinate payment service providers as digital transactions soar past N1 quadrillion
item.description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) don form Payments Service Providers Committee as digital payments for Naija don cross N1 quadrillion. The committee, wey dey chaired by the CBN and co-led by Deputy G...

item.title: NTSA Withdraws Instant Fines System, Court Case May Be Dismissed
item.description: The National Transport and Safety Authority (NTSA) has formally asked the High Court to dismiss a petition challenging its proposed Instant Fines Management System, saying the case is now moot. NTSA D...

item.title: Goodman Gallery at 60: Six Decades of Art, Dialogue and Cultural Impact
item.description: The Goodman Gallery in Johannesburg celebrates 60 years of fostering art and dialogue across South Africa and beyond. Founded in 1966 during apartheid, the gallery distinguished itself by exhibiting a...

item.title: Mercedes-Benz updates GLE SUV and Coupé with new styling, tech and powertrain improvements
item.description: Mercedes-Benz has officially launched the refreshed GLE SUV and Coupé models, bringing a host of design, technology, and mechanical upgrades. The exterior now features a redesigned front bumper, re-en...
